parameters.jsCode:
// Normalize incoming lead data from OpenClaw agent
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;

const lead = {
  agent_id: body.agent_id || 'unknown',
  business_slug: body.business_slug || 'unknown',
  business_name: body.business_name || 'Unknown Business',
  customer_name: body.customer_name || body.name || 'Unknown',
  customer_phone: body.customer_phone || body.phone || '',
  customer_email: body.customer_email || body.email || '',
  channel: body.channel || 'unknown',
  channel_handle: body.channel_handle || '',
  service_interest: body.service_interest || body.service || 'General inquiry',
  timeline: body.timeline || 'Not specified',
  notes: body.notes || '',
  lead_score: body.lead_score || 0,
  owner_telegram_chat_id: body.owner_telegram_chat_id || '',
  owner_email: body.owner_email || '',
  cal_link: body.cal_link || 'https://cal.com/bverse/15min',
  created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  status: 'new',
  follow_up_count: 0
};

return [{ json: lead }];

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Welcome — ' + $('Normalize Lead Data').item.json.business_name + ' got your message' }}
parameters.message:
=

Hey {{ $('Normalize Lead Data').item.json.customer_name }}!

Thanks for reaching out to {{ $('Normalize Lead Data').item.json.business_name }}. We received your message and someone will follow up with you shortly.

You mentioned you're interested in: {{ $('Normalize Lead Data').item.json.service_interest }}

In the meantime, you can book a time directly using the link below — it's the fastest way to get things moving:

Book a Time →

If you have any questions, just reply to this email or message us back on {{ $('Normalize Lead Data').item.json.channel }}.

Looking forward to connecting,
The Team at {{ $('Normalize Lead Data').item.json.business_name }}

Powered by LocalClaw AI — localclawagents.com

meta.description: LocalClaw lead capture workflow — receives webhook from OpenClaw agent, stores in Supabase, notifies owner via Telegram, sends welcome email via Resend, and generates a pre-filled Cal.com booking link.
